data.content: Plan ready for review. Implement by extending the existing beat detail API surface to enqueue scope refinement server-side, add a typed client helper, add a Refine Scope action to HeaderActions with terminal-state disable + pending feedback, and cover the route/UI behavior with focused tests. Main design point to confirm in review: use an added method/action on src/app/api/beats/[id]/route.ts so the feature reuses the current queue/worker infrastructure without creating a separate endpoint family.
